sections.label: Title
sections.guidance: Name case type and notable clinical feature.

sections.label: Abstract
sections.guidance: Summarize patient context, intervention, outcome, and key lesson.

sections.label: Case Presentation
sections.guidance: Describe patient history, timeline, and relevant examinations.

sections.label: Diagnostic Assessment
sections.guidance: Explain diagnostic rationale and differential diagnosis.

sections.label: Intervention and Outcome
sections.guidance: State treatment details and follow-up outcomes.

sections.label: Discussion
sections.guidance: Relate case to prior reports and highlight limitations.

sections.label: References
sections.guidance: Include references for comparison and clinical guidance.
